title: hieracium murorum subsp. exotericum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. exotericum, also known as Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to certain parts of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. exotericum include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve infusions or decoctions made from its leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
